metadata.description: Finam Trade API plugin collection for algorithmic trading and market data workflows.

plugins.name: finam
plugins.description: Finam Trade API skill. Skills: finam:trade-api — access real-time quotes, order book, OHLCV candles, portfolio and orders via REST, gRPC, and WebSocket; search and scan market instruments; place and cancel orders through Finam broker; develop and run algorithmic trading scripts.
